tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS - June 2025

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics for LIRR and Metro-North, prepared for the June 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
June 2025
This performance metrics document was prepared for the June 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. Operates 700 trains daily and maintains 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Rob Free, President, Long Island Rail Road

evidence_refs.source_quote: Rob Free President, Long Island Rail Road
Justin Vonashek President, Metro-North Railroad
MTA Construction and LIRR took an important step forward with the replacement of the Webster Avenue Bridge
MTA Police Department

tool_args.label: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committee

payload.entity_name: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees
payload.description: Committee members include Marc Herbst (Co-Chair), Blanca Lopez (Co-Chair), Gerard Bringmann, Samuel Chu, Michael Fleischer, Daniel Garodnick, Randolph Glucksman, Christopher Leathers, David Mack, Lisa Sorin, Midori Valdivia, Ed Valente, Neal Zuckerman

evidence_refs.source_quote: This performance metrics document was prepared for the June 2025 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees
Members of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committee include:

tool_args.label: MTA Completes Webster Avenue Bridge on Port Washington Branch
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Completes Webster Avenue Bridge on Port Washington Branch - This month, MTA Construction and LIRR took an important step forward with the replacement of the Webster Avenue Bridge

payload.description: Replacement of the 77-foot three-span bridge that carries cars over the LIRR's Port Washington Branch. Originally constructed in 1897. The Design-Build contractor demolished side spans while leaving center span protecting the track, requiring only one weekend track outage. Completed bridge increases vertical clearance and brings structure to state of good repair for another 100 years.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.
project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: East End Rail Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: Last year, the LIRR Track Department began a multi-year effort to replace over 24 miles (129,100 linear feet) of rail between Brookhaven (near the Long Island Expressway) and Riverhead.

payload.description: Multi-year effort to replace over 24 miles (129,100 linear feet) of rail between Brookhaven (near the Long Island Expressway) and Riverhead. Rail was originally installed between 1925 and 1956. In 2024, replaced approx. 39,700 linear feet in 54 working days. In 2025, replaced approx. 61,400 linear feet in 55 working days, a 54% increase in production.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Priority Repairs Underway on Grand Central Infrastructure
tool_args.raw_text: Priority Repairs Underway on Grand Central Infrastructure - This month, Construction & Development is advancing priority repairs at the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed and Park Avenue Tunnel

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Train Shed and Park Avenue Tunnel Priority Repairs
payload.description: Construction & Development is advancing priority repairs at the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed and Park Avenue Tunnel to bring critical infrastructure into a state of good repair. Addressing deterioration of structural steel framing, concrete deck and associated connections caused by age, wear and tear, and winter de-icing applications. Work includes replacement or reinforcement by steel plating of existing steel stringers, reinforcement of steel columns, girders and their connections, repair of concrete spalls and cracks, crush wall repairs, and painting of steel framing.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North One
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North One is our strategic plan that will carry us to 2033, our 50th anniversary, a journey we call our 'Road to Gold.'

payload.description: Metro-North's strategic plan to carry them to 2033 (50th anniversary - 'Road to Gold'). Built on six pillars: Safety, Customer Experience, Employee Engagement, Fiscal Responsibility, Resiliency & Sustainability, Innovation. Strategy includes reducing trip times, real-time information through TrainTime app, professional development programs, resetting budget baselines, hardening infrastructure, lowering emissions with more efficient fleet, and investing in battery-powered locomotives and virtual reality safety training.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Saturday Summer Savings
tool_args.raw_text: Saturday Summer Savings - This summer, we are so proud to offer our Summer Saturdays discount program once again.

payload.description: Each Saturday in July and August, monthly ticket holders can travel anywhere the LIRR goes and bring up to two friends or family members for just $1.00 each. Promotional $1 tickets can be purchased via the TrainTime app under Family Fares or on-board without incurring an extra charge.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: ADA Babylon Rehabilitation Project
tool_args.raw_text: crews completed Phase 1 of the ADA Babylon Rehabilitation project, reopening the western ends of both platforms.

payload.description: Phase 1 completed, reopening the western ends of both platforms. Babylon is a key transfer point for Montauk trains.

evidence_refs.source_quote: crews completed Phase 1 of the ADA Babylon Rehabilitation project, reopening the western ends of both platforms

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR carrying 285,050 riders and Metro-North carrying 255,638 riders. Together, the commuter railroads carried a record of 540,688 riders in a single travel day.

payload.description: New schedules went into effect with more trains to East End destinations. The 4:07 p.m. Thursday Cannonball express to Montauk returned. The 5:13 p.m. weekday train from Penn Station now runs to Montauk every weekday. Two Sunday trains now offer direct, one-seat rides from Montauk into Penn Station. Seasonal service returned to Long Beach and Ronkonkoma branches. Restored midday off-peak service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On May 19th, new schedules went into effect

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.
